examples: Typical fare includes fried radish cake with a sweetish sauce, egg pancakes and soybean milk.
The berry is nutritious and has a sweetish taste.
They saw Longjing tea is pure and fragrant and has a sweetish and mellow taste.
To my nose, Que smelled less of meat than of spices and a sickening sweetish smoke.
Nitrogen tetroxide is a reddish-brown gas at room temperature and has a "pungent, sweetish" smell, according to experts.
